title: Financial Agents — Market Watch & $10 Leaderboard
summary: A fleet of paper-trading strategy agents that watch the markets, make a daily prediction, and report effectiveness as a leaderboard: if each agent started the session with $10, what is it worth at the close? Net-new — a brain grep confirmed no prior financial/trading code existed in the FAMtastic repo (all 'trading/stock/crypto' hits were stock photos / the job queue). Simulation/paper first on real recent market data; live brokerage execution (e.g. Alpaca paper API) is a later, gated step requiring broker credentials.
honesty: A single session's P&L is noise, not skill. The harness exists to measure agents consistently over many sessions; treat day-one numbers as a smoke test of the pipeline, not proof of edge.
known_gaps: No prior financial code in the brain — built from scratch this session.
Live execution needs a broker account + API keys (Alpaca paper recommended first) — Fritz decision, gated.
Data source is keyless/free (e.g. Stooq) — fine for a daily sim, not low-latency intraday.
